# True Joy Birthing

> Birth education and planning tools — free for moms, Pro for doulas and midwives. Built by Shelbi Kohler, certified birth doula.

## Overview

True Joy Birthing (truejoybirthing.com) is a birth education platform and software company. It offers free tools for expecting mothers — a structured birth plan, a mobile app, and educational content — while selling Pro Mode subscriptions to birth professionals (doulas and midwives) who want to manage client birth plans efficiently.

The business model is SaaS-first: Pro Mode ($29.99/month via app stores) is the core revenue engine. The website monetizes through a $47 birth plan mini-course and $250-300 one-on-one confidence sessions.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://truejoybirthing.com/) — Free birth plan download, app links, social proof
- [About](https://truejoybirthing.com/about/) — Shelbi Kohler's bio, certification, philosophy
- [Blog](https://truejoybirthing.com/blog/) — Evidence-based birth education: doula costs, hiring guides, insurance, Medicaid
- [Birth Plan Course](https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-course/) — $47 self-paced mini-course with video lessons
- [Birth Plan Session](https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-session/) — $250-300 1:1 Zoom session with Shelbi
- [FAQ](https://truejoybirthing.com/faq/) — Common questions about doulas, birth plans, and insurance
- [Contact](https://truejoybirthing.com/contact/) — Email form for questions and support
- [New Doula Start Here](https://truejoybirthing.com/new-doula-start-here/) — Conversion funnel for birth professionals exploring Pro Mode
- [Birth Support by City](https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-support/) — Local hospital info, doula costs, and Medicaid status for Texas cities

## Products & Pricing

- **Free Birth Plan PDF** — Structured, hospital-ready birth plan. Email capture required.
- **Birth Plan Mini-Course** — $47 one-time. Self-paced video course covering every birth option and communication phrases.
- **1:1 Confidence Session** — $250-300 per session. 60-minute Zoom call to review plan line by line.
- **True Joy Birthing App (Parent Mode)** — Free iOS/Android app to build and share birth plans.
- **Pro Mode** — $29.99/month or $274.99/year. In-app subscription for doulas and midwives. Client plan dashboard, notes, and sharing tools.

## Target Audience

**Primary:** Expecting mothers in the U.S. searching for birth plans, doula information, and birth preparation tools. Especially first-time moms planning hospital births.

**Secondary:** Birth professionals (doulas, midwives) looking for client management tools and evidence-based resources to share.

## Service Area

True Joy Birthing is headquartered in the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex (Texas). The in-person 1:1 sessions are conducted via Zoom nationwide. The app and free PDF are available globally.

## Core Topics

- What is a doula and what do doula services include
- How much does a doula cost (by city and experience level)
- Doula vs midwife — the difference and when you need each
- How to hire a doula — interview questions and red flags
- Birth plan creation and hospital communication
- Doula insurance coverage and Medicaid reimbursement
- Postpartum doula support and recovery planning
- Debunking common doula myths

## Brand Voice

Warm, knowledgeable, non-judgmental. Shelbi writes like a trusted older sister who happens to be a certified doula. No medical advice. Always consult your care provider.

## Contact

- Email: support@truejoybirthing.com
- Instagram: @truejoybirthing
- App: Available on App Store and Google Play

## Policies

- No medical advice provided
- HIPAA-aligned data handling in Pro Mode
- Privacy policy and terms of service available on site
